title: NodeBuildSystem probe output
description: Slice of repo-context produced by the NodeBuildSystem probe (Layer A, Phase 1). Strict at the slice (`additionalProperties: false`) at every nested block, in keeping with Phase 1 ADR-0004. The slice is OPTIONAL at the envelope (ADR-0010): non-Node repos don't emit it and validation must pass. Warning IDs match the ADR-0007 pattern (`^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`); typed-exception IDs land in `ProbeOutput.errors` rather than in the slice.

package_manager.description: Lockfile-derived package manager (precedence: bun > pnpm > yarn > npm). Yarn splits into 'yarn-classic' (1.x — node_modules) and 'yarn-berry' (2+ — Plug'n'Play or node-modules linker) per Phase 1 ADR-0013, detected by (1) package.json#packageManager 'yarn@MAJOR.', (2) .yarnrc.yml, (3) .yarn/, (4) .pnp.cjs / .pnp.loader.mjs, (5) safe-default classic with the 'yarn_variant_inferred' warning. Null when no lockfile is present.

package_manager_version.description: Phase 1: always null; populated by NodeManifestProbe (S3-05) from the lockfile.

additional_lockfiles.description: Runner-up lockfiles in precedence order (not alpha-sorted).

commands.description: package.json#scripts verbatim. Non-string values are silently skipped.

bundler.description: First member of _BUNDLERS_SORTED present in dependencies ∪ devDependencies.

resolved_compiler_options.description: Loose at this layer: tsconfig.json#compilerOptions is unbounded in practice.

node_version_pinned.description: First non-null hit in the precedence chain (.nvmrc → .node-version → .tool-versions).

node_version_resolved_locally.description: node --version output if matches ^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+, else null.

warnings.description: Soft-degrade signals. Each item matches the ADR-0007 ID pattern.

errors.description: Forward-compatible per-slice error IDs. Phase 1 emits these on ProbeOutput.errors rather than in the slice.
